parameters.content:
## WF2: Contact Discovery

**Triggered by**: Schedule Trigger (Mon-Fri 7pm) or Manual Trigger

**Approval Gate Flow**:
1. Read Approved Opportunities (approved=TRUE, status=qualified)
2. Preserve opportunity data snapshot
3. Clearbit enrichment (company data)
4. Merge: restore opportunity fields + add Clearbit data
5. Hunter.io domain search (contacts)
6. Score & rank contacts by title priority
7. Confidence Gate: ≥70 = contact_found, <70 = needs_review
8. Write to Contacts sheet
9. Filter to items with valid opportunity_id + email + confidence≥70
10. Update Opportunity status → contact_found
11. Prepare WF3 Payload
12. Trigger WF3 (Outreach Draft)

**Archive Branch** (Schedule Trigger only):
- Read Unchecked Opportunities (approved=FALSE, status=qualified, age >2 days)
- Write to Archive tab with archived_reason=not_approved
- Mark status=archived in Opportunities tab

**Note**: Manual Trigger skips the archive branch. 1 extra API call (Clearbit+Hunter) per manual run — filtered before outreach.
